query: INSERT INTO oil_prices (month, avgPrice, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('2026-01', 65, NOW(), NOW()), ('2026-02', 67, NOW(), NOW()), ('2026-03', 71, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avgPrice = VALUES(avgPrice), updatedAt = NOW();
